## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] refactor / perf / style
- [ ] build / ci / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] `npm run format:check` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Docs updated where relevant
